programmes.show_description: In Suffolk, a series of farm thefts wreak havoc until CCTV provides the vital clues police need to crack the case. Plus shocking footage of the killing of protected wildlife.
A young couple need confirmation that they are expecting their first baby, and a woman with a history of postnatal depression is worried about her fourth pregnancy.
Four-year-old Skyler is rushed into Paediatrics care with recurring seizures; 65-year-old Shaun has tumbled down some steps; and Eric, 85, has a badly swollen leg.
Twenty-six-year-old Curtis has a condition that's been troubling him since he was ten. Plus, an operation to remove a facial cyst that's lying close to the temporal nerve.
Following the army of enforcers patrolling the streets, hunting down drivers for vehicle violations, including operations across from the Isle of Skye and in Surrey. (Ep1)

Carol pushes for big takings at her charity shop, Nigel hopes for a flawless gig, and we revisit Paul as he continues to expand his new barbecue venture.
Matt and Andy trial their bar's first family Halloween event, Wayne and Lisa hunt for a dream home, and Alex rallies Pearly Kings and Queens for charity.
In the new series, as well as tackling canine behavioural issues, Graeme Hall opens his new puppy school. Plus, a hellhound who's tearing a family apart, and viewers' doggie dilemmas.
Whether it's dealers moving supplies or users behind the wheel, it's a daily battle for the cops tackling drugs on Britain's roads.
Derbyshire cops pursue a getaway driver off-road down a footpath, a 21-year-old fights for his life, and a suspected drug runner is taken by surprise. With Jamie Theakston.
Officers in south Wales chase after individuals who have something to hide, such as drug dealers and couple caught during an outdoor romp.
Special episode of the reality series featuring the police dogs of the Cleveland and Durham Specialist Operations Unit, in training and in action.
Action-packed observational documentary series. Andy has a high-speed chase through a housing estate and Kev pays an early-morning visit to a drug dealer.
Damo and the firearms team tackle a supermarket gunman, while Gareth faces a death-defying pursuit along roads and back alleys.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies that are tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty. (Ep12)
Sonny and Remi lock horns. David has a new lead. Jo supports Tane.
Remi and Sonny go head-to-head. Has Leah lied to Justin? Holden won't take no for an answer.
Observational reality series filmed at the Balham Park Surgery, a busy NHS practice in south-west London. Dr Shilts Shah sheds some light on a woman with self-image issues.
The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless, and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs.
Medics act quickly to get David ready for surgery after his vehicle collided with a tractor. Trauma and plastic surgery teams attend Rodger after his paramotor crashed into the ground. (Ep2)
When Rachel is admitted to Royal Stoke emergency department after a head-on collision with another car, trauma team leader Anthony fears the worst.
Dr Adil Sheraz is called a magic man after making a giant ear keloid disappear. A breakdancer wants Dr Natalia Spierings to remove head cysts that get in the way of his head spins.
Paramedics are called when a woman is flung from her horse, and paramedic Mark and police constable Calum respond to a collision between a car driver and a 13-year-old E-scooter rider.
Stomach complaints keep the Balham Park GPs on their toes, but they suspect that nothing more than chicken nuggets and broccoli are to blame.
Junior Doctor Jake Mullen assesses 44-year old Kay who arrives at the hospital with flu-like symptoms. He runs the risk of contracting a highly contagious strain of flu.
The first episode of the new series features a lipoma so large it may not be safe to tackle under local anaesthetic, and a woman who's had alopecia for over 20 years.
In Surrey, traffic police officers Sean and Ewan stop a farm vehicle with an insecure load and a suspect number plate. In Northamptonshire, Terry reunites a woman with her car. (Ep2)

Paula hunts for a lucky break in Benidorm, animal rescuer Marina has her hands full with a new pup, while expats Danny, Kieron and Gary reflect on their bar ventures.
Val races to prep her Halloween disco, Adrian and Debbie hope their Turaco finds love, Paige performs for care home residents, and Frank makes a big sacrifice for charity.
A battle of wills with an un-Saintly Bernard is causing owner Cody to become isolated from her family. And outbursts from social media star Chihuahua Olive are impacting a couple.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. A teenage driver goes on the rampage in a 7.5 tonne truck, transporting stolen goods.
A hot pursuit gets even hotter when the pursuing car's brakes catch fire. A gadget allows thieves to clone keyfob signals remotely and steal cars without the keys.
On patrol across Derbyshire, the officers tackle a huge variety of crimes, ranging from drunk or drugged driving to catching gangs stealing cars or running drugs across county lines.
Ben Sutcliffe takes presenter Rick Edwards through interceptor training. And Kev Salter goes on drugs busts, accompanied by rookie Pete Tate on two of them.
A collection of some of the most extreme chases the Interceptors have been involved in, including a hot pursuit through a housing estate.
Kev reveals how to spot a drunk driver, before he gets behind a bolshy bandit with no regard for the speed limit, while Jacko follows an all-terrain tearaway.

Levi's protective over Abigail. Leah gives Holden a serve. Is Lacey in danger?
Dr Chris Pearce meets an anxious vicar who is concerned that a bloodshot eye will prevent him leading a funeral the next day. Reality series filmed at the Balham Park Surgery.
The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs.
Gross-out romantic comedy starring Cameron Diaz and Ben Stiller. A man hires a detective to find an old date, but the private eye turns out to be a ruthless love rival. (1998)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Gross-out romantic comedy starring Cameron Diaz and Ben Stiller. A man hires a detective to find an old date, but the private eye turns out to be a ruthless love rival. (1998)
Exploring the world of male and female strippers from social media performances to arena tours, including a look at striptease classes and the CCTV used on club premises.
